Wave 1 Campaign Cutoff

Wave 1 preorders will remain open until July 10th, 2026. This is the official deadline for reaching the minimum order quantity required for production. Orders placed after this date will not be included in Wave 1.

Refund Policy

All Wave 1 preorders are eligible for a full refund if the minimum order quantity of 109 units per design is not reached by July 10th, 2026. Refunds will be processed within 30 days of the campaign closing. If the minimum is reached, all sales are final and no refunds will be issued after production begins.
